name: react-postprocessing-selective-bloom
title: Selective Bloom
author: pmndrs and react-postprocessing contributors
description: Applies bloom only to selected objects and supplied lights.

changes: Declared the effect as client code and dispose it on unmount.
Declared the React Three Fiber composer as a client component.
Reduced default multisampling from 8 to 4 and dispose the composer on unmount.
Declared the selection helpers as client components.

Declared the React helpers as client code, made wrapEffect return explicit for React refresh transforms, removed circular JSON serialization from effect arguments, and added a native prefers-reduced-motion hook used by temporal effects.

modifications.change: Declared the effect as client code and dispose it on unmount.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component Next-compatible, motion-safe, bounded, and leak-free without changing its authored visual model.

modifications.change: Declared the React Three Fiber composer as a client component. Reduced default multisampling from 8 to 4 and dispose the composer on unmount.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component Next-compatible, motion-safe, bounded, and leak-free without changing its authored visual model.

modifications.change: Declared the selection helpers as client components.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component Next-compatible, motion-safe, bounded, and leak-free without changing its authored visual model.

modifications.change: Declared the React helpers as client code, made wrapEffect return explicit for React refresh transforms, removed circular JSON serialization from effect arguments, and added a native prefers-reduced-motion hook used by temporal effects.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component Next-compatible, motion-safe, bounded, and leak-free without changing its authored visual model.
